---
title: "About This Tutorial"
---

# About This Quarto Website

This website is built using Quarto and designed for beginners.

## What you will learn

- How Quarto converts Markdown into a website
- How to configure navigation
- How to use themes and custom CSS
- How to render your site locally

## Why this is useful

Quarto websites are ideal for:

- tutorials
- documentation
- project portfolios
- learning notes

## Next steps

- Add a new page such as `projects.qmd`
- Create a blog using Quarto website features
- Experiment with `format: html` options like `theme: darkly`

## More resources

- [Quarto Documentation](https://quarto.org/docs/)
- [Quarto Website Guide](https://quarto.org/docs/websites/)
